title: Frontend: Formula Editor Popup Component
description: Build a popup formula editor with human-readable expression input. Variable insertion from current collection (question values, formula results). Operator buttons (+, -, *, /, &&, ||, ?: ternary). Real-time syntax validation with error display. Output type display. JSON AST generation on save.

statusHistory.comment: Planning completed for TASK-15 - see plan document

Implementation complete. All components built: FormulaEditorPopup, FormulaList, astConverter, API proxy routes, backend wiring, integrations into FormForm/SectionForm/QuestionForm. Build passes, code review completed.
